meanings.definition: summon into action or bring into existence, often as if by magic
examples: he conjured wild birds in the air
call down the spirits from the mountain

meanings.definition: promote from a lower position or rank
examples: This player was brought up to the major league

meanings.definition: raise from a lower to a higher position
cause to come to a sudden stop
examples: The noise brought her up in shock

meanings.definition: put forward for consideration or discussion

examples: His name was mentioned in connection with the invention

meanings.definition: cause to load (an operating system) and start the initial processes
